scores for payment year specific FFS normalization and coding intensity adjustments. The FFS normalization adjustment 
accounts for changes in FFS population between the year the model is calibrated and the payment year. For Part C risk scores, 
the coding intensity adjustment accounts for changes in the diagnosis code submission patterns between FFS and MA. Both
